Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to use as source material for email content.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube for content creators matching entered keywords, returning channel data, video metrics, and audience engagement signals.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Rapidly surfaces relevant creator candidates from YouTube's vast catalog, cutting manual search time from hours to seconds.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Retrieves Instagram profile data for discovered creators, including follower counts, post frequency, and engagement metrics.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves the qualified creator list and learned outreach sequences and prompt templates stored in Drive.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures every outreach campaign starts from a vetted, up-to-date creator roster and battle-tested messaging, eliminating manual file hunting and reducing setup time per campaign.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each creator by applying learned sequences and prompt logic to their profile data.

Creator Reponse.action: Retrieves historical influencer email threads and negotiation transcripts used to train the AI on successful conversation patterns.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds the AI in real, proven negotiation outcomes, dramatically improving response quality over generic templates and preserving institutional knowledge.

Creator Reponse.action: Analyzes the incoming creator reply and generates a contextually appropriate negotiation response based on learned conversation history.

Creator Reponse.action: Reads incoming creator reply emails and sends the AI-drafted negotiation response back to the creator.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Reads the MHM vehicle data and cross-references it against the New Availability Guide to identify matching part numbers and build the load sheet.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates product launch email copy, sales sheet content, and monthly recap email narratives based on new product data inputs.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle stage reporting metrics including contact growth, deal pipeline data, and email performance stats for the reporting period.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Exports DFC sales transaction data including customer purchase history, order values, product categories, and last order dates.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen each week.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates fully structured B2B SEO blog posts targeting DFC's core audiences — shops, distributors, and fleets — using keyword-informed prompts.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Converts the Claude-generated script into a natural-sounding voiceover audio file using a configured AI voice.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Receives the monthly new arrivals file from Gerrit Young and triggers the agent to begin the distribution workflow.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors project tasks, statuses, deadlines, and assignments across active Asana boards and surfaces items requiring attention.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Pulls performance data and copy for all active search ads, flagging those that fall below defined thresholds for CTR, conversion rate, or Quality Score.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Sends the formatted weekly update email to the relevant stakeholders on a scheduled cadence.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Ensures the team stays aligned on automation progress every week without anyone needing to remember to write or send the update manually.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Mark submits a vehicle specification (make, model, year, and any other relevant attributes) through a HubSpot form, triggering the workflow.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Gives Mark a simple, repeatable way to kick off catalog requests without emailing anyone or accessing internal systems directly.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Queries the Dream ERP for all parts that match the submitted vehicle spec, returning both stocked items and any gaps where DFC has no inventory.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Pulls live inventory data in seconds, replacing what would otherwise require manual cross-referencing across multiple catalog and warehouse records.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Structures the raw inventory results into a clean, formatted Excel-ready layout — labeling stocked vs. missing parts, organizing by category, and flagging gaps clearly.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Produces a polished, client-facing output without requiring Mark or anyone else to manually clean or format a data export.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails Mark the completed Excel catalog file as an attachment, ready to use or share with a customer.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the finished catalog directly to Mark within minutes of his request, eliminating back-and-forth with internal teams and accelerating the sales process.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report — including on-hand quantity, on-order status, and in-transit details.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces the hours spent by a dozen team members doing independent lookups by centralizing all status data into one enriched report automatically.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Merges the live Dream inventory data into the existing backorder report, enriching each line item with current status and automatically flagging parts with no source or fulfillment path.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Turns a static backorder list into an actionable, prioritized report — making it immediately clear which parts need escalation and which are on track.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for affected backorder items, pre-populated with the relevant status details for each order.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Saves significant time on customer-facing communication by producing ready-to-send drafts, ensuring customers are updated accurately and consistently without manual writing.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract make, model, year, and part fitment data for all listed two-piece rotor SKUs.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Compiles competitor catalog coverage in a fraction of the time it would take to manually browse and record fitment data from three separate websites.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped fitment data against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify which vehicles are covered, which have gaps, and where DFC has a competitive overlap.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino a clear, data-driven view of where DFC stands in the two-piece rotor market and which fitments represent real new product opportunities.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers asking them to confirm demand or interest for specific vehicle fitments identified as gaps in DFC's catalog.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gathers real demand signals from the market without requiring manual outreach, helping prioritize which new SKUs are worth developing first.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped catalog data, cross-reference results, and customer response data into a single formatted output sheet for Dino's review.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a clean, consolidated reference document that Dino can use directly for sourcing decisions, without needing to reconcile data from multiple sources.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad copy — including headlines, body text, and CTAs — across every running campaign and ad set.
Meta Investigation.impact: Instantly surfaces the full text of every live ad in one pass, making compliance or copy audits possible in seconds rather than hours of manual platform review.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every piece of retrieved ad copy for the specified target phrases, records the exact field and full copy string where each match is found, and compiles a flagged results list.
Meta Investigation.impact: Eliminates the risk of missing a problematic phrase buried in a large ad library by systematically checking every field, delivering a precise and audit-ready findings report.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a formatted email report listing every flagged ad with the exact field, matched phrase, and surrounding copy context for immediate review.
Meta Investigation.impact: Puts actionable findings in the right person's inbox the moment the scan completes, enabling fast compliance response or copy corrections without navigating ad platforms.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications, extracts the resume attachment and applicant details, and triggers the processing workflow for each new email.
Resume Bot.impact: Ensures no application is missed or delayed in an unmonitored inbox, giving every candidate an immediate and consistent experience from the moment they apply.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF to a structured folder in Drive, organized by role and date, so every application is archived before any decisions are made.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a permanent, organized record of all applicants that the team can reference later without digging through email threads or worrying about attachments being lost.

Resume Bot.action: Reads each resume and scores the candidate against the open role's requirements, producing a hiring recommendation and categorizing the applicant as Approved, Denied, or Pending based on role availability.
Resume Bot.impact: Replaces hours of manual resume screening with consistent, criteria-based evaluations — letting the hiring team focus their attention on only the most qualified candidates.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every applicant's name, role, score, decision, and resume link to a Sheets dashboard — routing denied and no-resume candidates to the main log and paused-role candidates to a dedicated Pending tab — while Gmail sends corresponding auto-reply emails.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives the hiring team a live dashboard of the full applicant pipeline and ensures every candidate receives a timely, professional response regardless of hiring volume.

summary: The AI automation pipeline is running strong with 56 total agents across the team — 28 completed, 10 in progress, and 18 planned. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages, so the roster remains steady heading into the next cycle. The team continues to make solid progress working through the active builds, with the in-progress queue holding key initiatives like the R1 Customer Agent, Amazon Ads AI, and the Friction Friday video production tool. Great momentum overall — stay tuned for more updates as those in-progress agents push toward completion!
